summary: Builds lookup tables that associate media types with extensions and extensions with their selected media type.
signature_intent: Accepts two mutable lookup objects and fills them using a shared media metadata registry.
behavior: Adds each media type's extension list to the media-type lookup when extensions are available.
Adds an extension-to-media-type mapping for each listed extension.
When multiple media types share an extension, keeps an existing mapping if it has a higher-ranked metadata source.
For equal metadata ranking, keeps a non-generic existing application media type over a later application media type.
Allows the generic binary media type to be replaced by a later matching candidate.
edge_cases: Existing mappings may remain unchanged when a later candidate is lower ranked.
Generic binary mappings do not block replacement.
